title: Retrait

pages.text:
UNITED ARAB EMIRATES

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN

AFFAIRS

His Excellency M. Jean-Bernard Raimond

Minister for Foreign Affairs

Republic of France

Excellency,

Whereas the Government of France, being Depository of the INTER- NATIONAL AGREEMENT FOR THE CREATION OF AN INTERNATIONAL OFFICE OF

EPIZOOTICS IN PARIS,

And whereas the Government of the United Arab Emirates acceded to the said Agreement,

Now, pursuant to article VIII of the Agreement, the Government of the United Arab Emirates has decided with the deepest regret to withdraw from the Agreement and to this effect submits this notification of withdrawal, wishing the Office continuing success.

Please accept, Excellency, the assurances of my highest consideration.

Smit

Rashid Abdallah Al Noaimi

Minister of State for Foreign Affairs
